hooks.command: cd "c:/Users/Prakash K/Downloads/dusit-learning/dusit-learning" && status=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$status" ]; then git add -A && git -c user.email="dhihospitalitysolutions@gmail.com" -c user.name="Prakash K" commit -m "auto: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" -q && git push origin main -q && echo '{"systemMessage":"✓ Changes pushed — live at https://lmsdusit.dhihospitality.com in ~30s"}'; fi
